text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 87 

MDCR_LTCH_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Long-Term Care Hospital Months (from Claims) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of months during the year when CCW identified a Medicare claim for a 
Long-term Care Hospital (LTCH) stay. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Inpatient Claims (derived) 

VALUES: 1–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW uses a CMS algorithm to identify LTCH: Using
